---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    css: style.css
    body_class: home-page
---
<div class="home-page">

<div class="home-wrapper">
<div class="home-card">

<h1 class="home-name">Emily Wilhelm</h1>

::: columns
::: {.column width="45%"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='70%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/Grad_Headshot.PNG")
```

:::

::: {.column width="55%" style="text-align: left;"}


<strong>About Me</strong>

I recently earned my MPH in Environmental Health from Emory Rollins School of Public Health, with certificates in Data Science and Climate & Health. My research at Rollins focused on using statistical and geospatial analysis to evaluate the intra-urban variability of air pollution and heat exposure across Metro Atlanta residents. 


:::
